name: execution_equality_forces_fn_equality
reason: if the SMT solver can derive intensional spec_fn equality from pointwise equivalence through Execution wrapping, it would collapse the extensional/intensional distinction without any external_body axiom

name: implies_apply_closure_bridge
reason: implies_apply is external_body bridging p.implies(q).satisfied_by(ex) through TempPred::new closure wrapping and direct implication — silently resolves closure identity mismatch

name: entails_preserved_by_always_intensional_bridge
reason: entails_preserved_by_always is external_body lifting entailment through always — bridges the forall-over-suffix closure inside always with the entailment closure without proof

name: always_weaken_vacuous_spec
reason: an unsatisfiable spec vacuously entails always(q) for any q — always_weaken propagates this without checking spec satisfiability, potentially hiding specification errors

name: always_weaken_strengthens_to_valid
reason: always_weaken composes two external_body axioms (implies_apply + entails_preserved_by_always) to derive always(q) from always(p) under a pointwise implication — the composition amplifies the unverified trust surface across both axioms
